project.title: Mi hermana me ahogó. Desperté el día de mi boda. - Parte 3
project.subtitle: El motivo
project.hook: Mi abuelo firmó su testamento antes de mi boda. Delante de mi hermana.

base.prompt: EMPTY old Korean study seen from the door, a heavy dark wood desk facing the room, a high leather chair behind it, walls of old books and a calligraphy scroll, a green banker lamp lit on the desk, cold afternoon light through a shuttered window, no people, no text, realistic cinematic K-drama, vertical 9:16.

frente_escritorio.prompt: Same old study, new camera position from the visitor side of the desk looking at the empty high leather chair, the dark desk edge in the foreground, the bookshelves and scroll behind, same green lamp light, empty set, no people, no text.

detras_escritorio.prompt: Same old study, new camera position from behind the desk looking back at the room and the closed door, the desk surface in the foreground, the shuttered window on one side, same green lamp light, empty set, no people, no text.

close_escritorio.prompt: Same old study, extreme close view of the dark wood desk surface with a leather blotter and a brass letter tray in the foreground, the green lamp glow across the wood, shallow depth of field, empty set, no people, no text.
